Reference¶

  • hypermodern_python.console

  • hypermodern_python.get_data

hypermodern_python.console¶

Command-line interface.

hypermodern_python.get_data¶

Client for the JSON Placeholder REST API, version 1.

class hypermodern_python.get_data.Data(title, id)¶

Data resource.

title¶

The title of the post or to-do.

id¶

User Identifier.

hypermodern_python.get_data.api_data(endpoint)¶

Return a data from an API end point.

Performs a GET request to the /page/endpoint.

Parameters:

endpoint (str) – The JSON Placeholder API endpoint. By default, “todos”.

Return type:

Data

Returns:

Data resource.

Raises:

ClickException – The HTTP request failed or the HTTP response contained an invalid body.

Example

>>> from hypermodern_python import get_data
>>> data = get_data.api_data("todos")
>>> bool(data.title)
True

hypermodern-python
